race_meta.race_name: Create Your Bet Builders At Midnite Handicap

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked toomuchforme at position 4 with only 10.0% probability. Top pick was I Need Your Love (19.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was I Need Your Love > Shalaa Asker, but actual result was Toomuchforme > Shalaa Asker. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Toomuchforme had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.5%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
